description: Rajeev Chandrasekhar resigned from Republic TV's board after becoming a BJP member. At that point his indirect 16.82% holding through Asianet remained; Asianet reduced its stake in May 2019.

Network18 board chairman Adil Zainulbhai served as chair of the Government of India's Capacity Building Commission from April 2021 until August 2025. This records a formal government appointment; it is not evidence of party membership or editorial influence.
PTI board chairman Mahendra Mohan Gupta served in the Rajya Sabha as a Samajwadi Party member from 2006 to 2012. This is a concluded elected role and does not establish PTI's editorial position.

PTI board vice chairman M. V. Shreyams Kumar served in the Rajya Sabha as a Loktantrik Janata Dal member from August 2020 to April 2022. This is a concluded elected role and does not establish PTI's editorial position.
